Support FAQ - Our company
Learn more about SF-Filter and find out the benefits of becoming a customer.
Support & Complaints
How can I contact the field service?
Please fill out a contact form (Contact Form Link) to request contact from the field sales force.
For more information about our SF-Filter export, please visit this page:
Link to Export Sales Areas.
Our field sales representatives are available to answer your questions and assist you with your concerns.
How can I request a phone consultation?
We are happy to provide telephone consultations.

What experience does SF-Filter have in the field of filtration?
At SF-Filter, we have extensive experience in the field of filtration, dating back to 1968 when Heini Schupp founded a retail business for automotive accessories in Kloten, Switzerland (
Link: Our history
For over 50 years, we have been dedicated to fulfilling our customers' filtration needs and have continuously expanded our offering to provide a wide range of filter solutions.
Over the years, we have expanded our business and are present in Europe, with branches in
France, Germany, Austria, and Poland.
Our long-standing experience and commitment to quality make us a trusted partner for all your filtration requirements.
What commitment does SF-Filter show to sustainability?
At SF-Filter, we consider sustainability to be an integral part of our business model.
